title: Arteta: 'Brave' VAR call could alter Arsenal histo...
summary: Mikel Arteta praised officials for disallowing West Ham's 94th-minute equalizer, which keeps Arsenal on course for the Premier League title. The controversial VAR decision was critical for Arsenal's championship aspirations. This call could prove decisive in the title race.
content: Mikel Arteta congratulated the match officials for disallowing West Ham's 94th-minute equalizer -- a decision that he called brave and that leaves Arsenal on course to win the Premier League title.

zh.title: 阿尔特塔："勇敢"的VAR判罚可能改变阿森纳历史
zh.summary: 米克尔·阿尔特塔称赞裁判取消了西汉姆联的第94分钟进球，使阿森纳继续朝着英超冠军迈进。这一备受争议的VAR判罚对阿森纳的冠军抱负至关重要。这次判罚可能在争冠中起到决定性作用。

title: Bowen slams VAR as West Ham stuck in drop zone
summary: West Ham captain Jarrod Bowen and manager Nuno Espirito Santo criticized the VAR decision to disallow their late equalizer against Arsenal. The officials' call is being questioned for consistency in refereeing standards. This controversial decision adds to West Ham's struggles in the relegation battle.
content: West Ham captain Jarrod Bowen and manager Nuno Espirito Santo have both hit out at the officials following the late disallowed goal against Arsenal, questioning refereeing consistency.

zh.title: 博文抨击VAR 西汉姆联陷入降级区
zh.summary: 西汉姆联队长贾罗德·博文和主教练努诺·埃斯皮里托·桑托批评了裁判取消他们对阵阿森纳晚期进球的VAR判罚。官员的判罚在裁判标准一致性方面受到质疑。这一有争议的判罚加剧了西汉姆联在保级战中的困境。

title: 'Tough day:' Flick mourns dad as Barça win LaLiga
summary: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick guided his team to the LaLiga title against Real Madrid hours after learning of his father's death. The emotional win over the club's rivals was bittersweet for the coach dealing with personal tragedy. Flick's composure under difficult circumstances garnered sympathy from the sporting world.
content: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said it had been a "tough day" after guiding his team to the LaLiga title against Real Madrid just hours after learning of the death of his father.

zh.title: "艰难的一天"：弗利克哀悼父亲 巴萨赢得西甲冠军
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那主教练汉西·弗利克在得知父亲去世数小时后，带领球队战胜皇家马德里赢得西甲冠军。这次对俱乐部死敌的情感胜利对正经历个人悲剧的主教练来说是苦乐参半的。弗利克在困难环境下的沉着冷静赢得了体育界的同情。

title: Berhalter brushes off WC roster reveal 'pressure'
summary: U.S. midfielder Sebastian Berhalter said he is unfazed by waiting for the USMNT's World Cup roster announcement in the final two weeks. His calm demeanor suggests confidence in his selection prospects. The dismissal of pressure reflects professional maturity ahead of the major tournament.
content: Vancouver Whitecaps and U.S. international midfielder Sebastian Berhalter says the final two weeks until the USMNT's World Cup roster is announced "doesn't feel like pressure."

zh.title: 贝尔哈特尔淡化世界杯名单公布的"压力"
zh.summary: 美国中场塞巴斯蒂安·贝尔哈特尔表示，在等待美国国家队世界杯名单公布的最后两周里毫不畏惧。他冷静的态度表明他对自己被选中的前景充满信心。这种从容的心态在这项重大赛事前反映了职业的成熟度。

title: Rodman exits Spirit game after on-field treatment
summary: Trinity Rodman was substituted early in the second half of Washington Spirit's match against Seattle Reign FC after receiving medical treatment on the field. The early substitution raises concerns about a potential injury. Rodman's status could impact the Spirit's performance in the season.
content: Trinity Rodman was substituted early in the second half of the Washington Spirit's game against Seattle Reign FC on Sunday after receiving treatment on the field from the team's medical staff.

zh.title: 罗德曼在场上治疗后退出精神队比赛
zh.summary: 三位一体的罗德曼在华盛顿精神队对阵西雅图雨城FC的比赛中，在接受场上医疗治疗后于下半场早早被替换下场。提前替换引发了对潜在伤病的担忧。罗德曼的状态可能会影响精神队本赛季的表现。

title: Magic man? Rashford wants Barça stay if he can
summary: Marcus Rashford expressed his desire to remain at Barcelona after scoring in their La Liga-clinching victory over Real Madrid. His goal on such a momentous night suggests he is settled at the club. Rashford's potential long-term future at Barcelona could be important for the club's plans.
content: Marcus Rashford said scoring on the night Barcelona won La Liga by beating arch-rivals Real Madrid was "the perfect way to end."

zh.title: 魔术师？如果可能，拉什福德想留在巴萨
zh.summary: 马库斯·拉什福德在帮助巴塞罗那击败皇家马德里赢得西甲冠军的胜利中进球后，表达了他想留在巴塞罗那的愿望。他在这个重要夜晚的进球表明他已经在这家俱乐部站稳脚跟。拉什福德在巴塞罗那的潜在长期前景可能对俱乐部的计划至关重要。

title: Nico Williams injury could impact Spain WC place
summary: Spain forward Nico Williams was substituted before halftime in Athletic Club's loss to Valencia, raising injury concerns ahead of the World Cup. The injury to a key player could complicate Spain's World Cup squad planning. This development adds uncertainty to Spain's tournament preparations.
content: Spain forward Nico Williams had to be substituted before halftime in Athletic Club's 1-0 loss to Valencia at home on Sunday, prompting concerns ahead of the World Cup.

zh.title: 尼科·威廉姆斯伤势可能影响西班牙世界杯席位
zh.summary: 西班牙前锋尼科·威廉姆斯在竞技俱乐部对阵瓦伦西亚的比赛中上半场被替换下场，引发了对世界杯前夕伤势的担忧。一名关键球员的伤势可能会使西班牙世界杯阵容规划变得复杂。这一发展为西班牙的赛事准备增添了不确定性。

title: Fabregas' Como beat Verona, clinch European spot
summary: Cesc Fabregas's Como secured European football for next season with a 1-0 victory over Hellas Verona. The win marks an important achievement for the club's European qualification ambitions. Como's qualification represents success under Fabregas's management.
content: Cesc Fabregas's Como secured their spot in European football next season with a 1-0 win over Hellas Verona.

content: Which key players might not be participating in this summer's tournament? Here's the latest on key injuries impacting World Cup teams.

content: Barça are LaLiga champions after winning the Clásico, on a night full of contrasts between them and Real Madrid.

zh.summary: 巴塞罗那在与皇家马德里的激烈国家德比中获胜,赢得了西甲冠军。对死敌的胜利为冠军荣耀增添了历史意义。这场胜利彰显了巴塞罗那本赛季对皇家马德里的压倒性优势。

title: Enough drama? How Man City, Brighton booked Women'...

content: Bunny Shaw's and Nadine Noordam's heroics helped their sides to the Women's FA Cup final with late goals.

title: Arsenal win could catapult them to Premier League ...
summary: Arsenal's dramatic late victory over West Ham United moves them five points clear in the Premier League title race. The win represents a significant step toward the championship after a tightly contested match. This result could prove decisive in determining the season's ultimate champion.
content: It was a dramatic last few minutes, but Arsenal's late win over West Ham United puts the Gunners five clear.

zh.summary: 哈茨队和凯尔特人队正在争夺中场球员伦纳德的签约，而流浪者队经理准备接受俱乐部主席的评估。这些苏格兰俱乐部之间的转会竞争突出了夏季转会活动的广度。流浪者队的内部发展为竞争格局增加了背景。
